title: genista tournefortii subsp. decipiens
intro: Genista tournefortii subsp. decipiens, also known as a sub-species of the broom plant, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Genista tournefortii subsp. decipiens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
